zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert de Marston I, Lord Multon於1465年出生在英國英格蘭諾福爾可雷普斯時，他的父親Thomas Marston30歲，母親Margaret Moultan26歲。他於大約1490年與Lady Margaret T. Moulton結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1512年12月12日在英國諾福爾可雷普斯 煙雨 巴斯特維其可享年47歲，埋葬在英國諾福爾可雷普斯 煙雨 巴斯特維其可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert de Marston I, Lord Multon于1465年出生在英国英格兰諾福爾可雷普斯时，他的父亲Thomas Marston30岁，母亲Margaret Moultan26岁。他于大约1490年与Lady Margaret T. Moulton结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1512年12月12日在英国諾福爾可雷普斯 煙雨 巴斯特維其可享年47岁，埋葬在英国諾福爾可雷普斯 煙雨 巴斯特維其可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Marston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or other of the numerous places called Marston or Merston, in counties including Bedfordshire, Cheshire, Derbyshire, Gloucestershire, Isle of Wight, Kent, Northamptonshire, Oxfordshire, Shropshire, Staffordshire, Sussex, and Worcestershire. Most of the placenames derive from Old English mersc ‘marsh’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

variants.name: Marson
meanings: English (Midlands): variant of Marston , a common placename which was often spelled and pronounced Marson.
French: habitational name from any of the places so called in Marne and Meuse, or from Marçon in Sarthe. This surname is also found in Germany.

variants.name: Maston
meanings: English: variant of Marston with loss of -r-.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert de Marston I, Lord Multon was born in 1465, in Repps, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Marston, was 30 and his mother, Margaret Moultan, was 26. He married Lady Margaret T. Moulton about 1490. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 12 December 1512, in Repps with Bastwick, Norfolk, England, at the age of 47, and was buried in Repps with Bastwick, Norfolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert de Marston I, Lord Multon est né en 1465, à Repps, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Thomas Marston, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Margaret Moultan, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret T. Moulton environ 1490. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 12 décembre 1512, à Repps with Bastwick, Norfolk, Angleterre, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Repps with Bastwick, Norfolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert de Marston I, Lord Multon 1465 in Repps, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Marston 30 und seine Mutter Margaret Moultan 26. Er hat um 1490 Lady Margaret T. Moulton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 12. Dezember 1512 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Repps with Bastwick, Norfolk, England und wurde in Repps with Bastwick, Norfolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de Marston I, Lord Multon è nato il nel 1465 nel Repps, Norfolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Thomas Marston, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Moultan, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret T. Moulton circa 1490. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 12 dicembre 1512, nel Repps with Bastwick, Norfolk, England, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Repps with Bastwick, Norfolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Marston I, Lord Multonが1465年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクレップスで生まれた時，父Thomas Marstonは30歳，母Margaret Moultanは26歳であった。約1490年にLady Margaret T. Moultonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1512年12月12日にイギリスノーフォルクレップス ウィス バストウィックで47歳で死去し，イギリスノーフォルクレップス ウィス バストウィックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert de Marston I, Lord Multon(이)가 1465년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 레프스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Marston(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Moultan(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1490년 Lady Margaret T. Moulton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1512년 12월 12일 영국 노르폴크 레프스 위스 바스트윅에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르폴크 레프스 위스 바스트윅에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert de Marston I, Lord Multon nasceu em 1465, em Repps, Norfolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Thomas Marston, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Moultan, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret T. Moulton aproximadamente 1490. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de dezembro de 1512, em Repps with Bastwick, Norfolk, Inglaterra, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Repps with Bastwick, Norfolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert de Marston I, Lord Multon родился в 1465 г. в местности реппс, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Thomas Marston было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Moultan, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret T. Moulton около 1490 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 12 декабря 1512 г. в местности реппс вит баствикк, норфолк, Англия в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности реппс вит баствикк, норфолк, Англия.
